title: Claim Ledger Guard

metrics.name: safe_wording
metrics.value: finite candidate measures can concentrate the T252-style tail, but remain underived

strongest_claim: Safe wording is finite and conditional: candidate measures concentrate the tail but are not physical measures.
improved: T368 prevents overclaiming from the strong finite scores.
weakened_or_falsified: It weakens claim-ledger upgrades from this round alone.
falsification_condition: T368 fails if it claims a derived selection law.
s1_update: S1 remains requires_added_assumption for the finite ordinal route.
claim_ledger_update: Do not update the claim ledger from T368 alone.
open_blocker: No finality-domain dynamics derive the successful finite weighting rule yet.
suggested_next: Derive or reject the candidate action from finality-domain data rather than from post-hoc tail labels.
not_claimed: These finite measure stress tests do not define a physical measure, estimate dimension, prove faithful embedding, validate random sprinkling, derive metric structure, establish a continuum limit, or settle S1.
